name: Goodwood Capital Limited
summary: Goodwood Capital Limited operates as a mobile media advertising company in Australia, New Zealand, and Southeast Asia. It offers precision geo-location and audience based in-app and mobile Web advertising solutions. The company also provides programmatic geographic mobile platform for customers to manage on a self-service basis. The company was formerly known as Snakk Media Limited and changed its name to Goodwood Capital Limited in October 2020. Goodwood Capital Limited was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. As of October 19, 2020, Goodwood Capital Limited was taken private.
